en_title: Resident Evil Veronica Finally Gives Claire Redfield Her Due
cn_title: 《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》《生化危机 维罗妮卡》重制版公布，克莱尔终于迎来主场
subtitle: 看点来了
opus_summary: 在夏日游戏节上，卡普空正式公布《生化危机 维罗妮卡》重制版，让克莱尔·雷德菲尔德时隔多年再次成为主线主角。自2019年《生化危机2》重制版后，粉丝一直期盼她的故事延续，如今终于如愿。

paragraphs.en: This is an IGN opinion piece from writer Matt Cabral, who's been playing Resident Evil religiously ever since the Spencer Mansion welcomed him through its creaking double doors back in 1996.
paragraphs.cn: 本文是IGN撰稿人Matt Cabral的观点文章。自1996年斯宾塞洋馆吱嘎作响的双门迎接他以来，他一直在虔诚地游玩《生化危机》系列。

paragraphs.en: The big Summer Game Fest reveal of Resident Evil Veronica probably had some fans – especially those raised on the fright-filled franchise's recent remakes – eliciting a collective, "It's about damn time."
paragraphs.cn: 夏日游戏节上《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》的盛大公布，可能让一些粉丝——尤其是那些玩着该恐怖系列近期重制版长大的玩家——集体发出「总算来了」的感叹。

paragraphs.en: Not because these more contemporary players of the 30-year-old series have heard so much about the cult-favorite, non-numbered entry – originally a Sega Dreamcast exclusive dubbed Resident Evil – Code: Veronica – and are eager to finally discover what the fuss is about. And not because they're relieved all the rumors and speculation regarding the next remake project have been squashed like a Las Plagas parasite.
paragraphs.cn: 倒不是因为这些入坑30年老系列不久的新玩家，听说了太多关于这部粉丝追捧、无编号作品——最初是世嘉Dreamcast独占的《生化危机 代号：维罗妮卡》——的种种传说，迫不及待想一探究竟。也不是因为他们终于松了口气，所有关于下一部重制项目会是什么的传言和猜测，终于像Las Plagas寄生虫一样被捏碎。

paragraphs.en: No, these recently christened stalwarts of Capcom's seminal survival horror series were happy because they've been patiently waiting to catch up with Claire Redfield – and her urgent quest to find her missing brother Chris – since rolling credits in the Resident Evil 2 remake over seven years ago.
paragraphs.cn: 不，这些刚入坑卡普空这一开创性生存恐怖系列的死忠之所以高兴，是因为自七年多前通关《生化危机2》重制版并看完制作人员名单后，他们就一直在耐心等着与克莱尔·雷德菲尔德重逢，等待她踏上寻找失踪哥哥克里斯的紧迫旅程。

paragraphs.en: Of course, whether you completed RE2's remake campaign as Claire, Leon, or both, you already know she sadly learned that her long lost sibling was actually on "vacation" in Europe, a trip he'd embarked on long before she even arrived in the zombie-infested Raccoon City.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，无论你当年是以克莱尔、里昂，还是双主角通关了《生化危机2》重制版战役，你都已知晓她遗憾地得知，自己失散已久的哥哥其实是在欧洲「度假」——这趟旅行早在克莱尔踏入丧尸横行的浣熊市之前就已启程。

paragraphs.en: Now, if you're not a seasoned survivor who's been battling the franchise's infected foes ever since those plagued canines came crashing through the Spencer Mansion's windows, then you understandably might have expected the series' next remake, Resident Evil 3 , to pick right up with Claire getting her passport stamped in Paris. In fact, you could even be excused for initially believing the 2020 RE3 remake's opening had put you back in the boots of RE2's crimson-clad protagonist. Afterall, you begin RE3 from the first-person perspective of a female character exploring an apartment filled with cryptic items, including a massive Raccoon City map and a photo of Dr. Annette Birkin, a pivotal RE2 character that practically died in Claire's arms.
paragraphs.cn: 现在，如果你不是从那些瘟疫犬撞破斯宾塞洋馆窗户起，便一直在与系列感染敌群搏杀的资深幸存者，那么你或许会理所当然地以为，系列下一部重制版《生化危机3》会紧接着讲述克莱尔在巴黎盖上护照印章。事实上，就算你最初以为2020年《生化危机3》重制版的开场，是让你再次穿上《生化危机2》那位红衣主角的靴子，也情有可原。毕竟，你开场是以一名女性角色的第一人称视角，探索一间摆满神秘物品的公寓，其中包括一张巨大的浣熊市地图，以及一张《生化危机2》关键角色安妮特·柏金博士的照片——这个角色几乎就是在克莱尔怀中死去的。

paragraphs.en: Despite these potential call-backs, it quickly becomes obvious RE3 is Jill Valentine's living, Nemesis-inhabited nightmare, picking up her story following the series' 1996 debut . But while RE3 skipped over Claire and Chris' tale, the next chronological remake, 2023's Resident Evil 4 , put players back beneath the dirty blonde locks of RE2's Leon S. Kennedy, who actually did head to Europe six years later – but not to hunt down his former RPD co-worker.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管可能有这些致敬元素，但很快就能看出《生化危机3》是吉尔·瓦伦丁的亲身噩梦，追踪者步步紧逼，故事承接系列1996年首作之后。但《生化危机3》跳过了克莱尔和克里斯的故事，而按时间顺序排列的下一个重制版，2023年的《生化危机4》，又让玩家回到《生化危机2》里昂·S·肯尼迪的金色头发之下，他确实在六年后去了欧洲——但并非去寻找他那位前浣熊市警局同事。

paragraphs.en: Which brings us back to the upcoming Resident Evil Veronica, a much-requested remake candidate that doesn't just properly continue Claire's sidelined quest to find her sibling, but also puts players behind a beloved character that's been too-often benched in favor of other franchise faves Leon, Jill, and yes, her own brother, Chris.
paragraphs.cn: 这就说到了即将推出的《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》，一款呼声极高的重制候选作品，不仅恰当地延续了克莱尔被搁置的寻兄之旅，也让玩家再次扮演一位备受喜爱却常常被冷落的角色——每次让位于系列其他主角，里昂、吉尔，没错，还有她的亲哥哥克里斯。

paragraphs.en: Without getting lost in the math – or quibbling over canon versus non-canon, core entries versus spin-offs, sorta-sequels, on-rails shooters, mobile titles, and any other media the Umbrella logo might have appeared in – let's just say Claire is widely recognized among the franchise's top four heroes, yet has been playable in less mainline games than the other three. Outside of her dedicated campaigns in the original RE2 and Code: Veronica, her most prominent T-Virus-vanquishing outing was 2015's Resident Evil: Revelations 2 , Capcom's (excellent) episodic spin-off series.
paragraphs.cn: 先不掰扯那些数字——也先不论哪些算正传、哪些算外传，核心作品、衍生作品、准续作、光枪射击游戏、手游，以及任何出现过安布雷拉标志的其他媒体——我们只说一点：克莱尔公认为系列四大主角之一，但她在主线作品中可控的次数，却少于另外三位。除了原版《生化危机2》和《代号：维罗妮卡》中她专属的战役外，她最出风头的抗病毒冒险是2015年的《生化危机：启示录2》，卡普空出色的章节式衍生系列。

paragraphs.en: Revelations 2 represented a solid showcase for the character, who'd gone from capable college student in RE2 to seasoned solider within antibioterrorism taskforce TerraSave. But still, 15 years stood between Claire's acclaimed turn in 2000's Code: Veronica and her official return in Revelations 2. And, if we're nitpicking, it's worth noting that two of her three outings as a primary protagonist weren't even among the series core, numbered entries.
paragraphs.cn: 《启示录2》充分展示了这名角色的蜕变，从《生化危机2》里能干的大学生成长为反生化恐怖主义组织‘泰拉拯救’（TerraSave）中的老练战士。但无论如何，从克莱尔在2000年《代号：维罗妮卡》中大受好评的表现，到她在《启示录2》中正式回归，中间相隔了整整15年。而且，如果较真一点，值得注意的是，在她三次担任主角的经历中，有两次甚至都不算系列带数字编号的核心作品。

paragraphs.en: Don't get me wrong, Claire got lots of love in those aforementioned peripheral titles. Following her dedicated campaigns, she continued thinning the flesh-craving hordes in everything from arcade-y lightgun games (Resident Evil Survivor 2 – Code: Veronica, Resident Evil: The Darkside Chronicles) to the franchise's foray into online and squad-based shooters (Resident Evil: Operation Raccoon City, Resident Evil Re: Verse.)
paragraphs.cn: 别误会，克莱尔在上述这些外围作品中备受青睐。在专属战役之后，她继续在各类游戏中消灭渴望血肉的尸群，既有街机风格的光枪游戏（《枪下游魂2：代号 维罗妮卡》《生化危机：暗黑编年史》），也有系列进军在线与团队射击领域的作品（《生化危机：浣熊市行动》《生化危机：逆转》）。

paragraphs.en: She also appeared in more mediocre mobile titles than you can shake a mutated tentacle at, and even abandoned her RE roots for countless cameos and crossovers in such series as Viewtiful Joe and Onimusha. Claire was seemingly more popular than her brother, yet rarely scored the franchise's meatiest roles. Heck, if you really want to get a sense of her popularity – and padded resume – look no further than her pixelated appearance in 2003's Capcom Black Jack.
paragraphs.cn: 她还出现在数不胜数的平庸手游中——多到数不清——甚至抛开《生化危机》出身，在《红侠乔伊》《鬼武者》等系列中客串和联动。克莱尔的人气似乎比她哥哥还高，但很少获得系列中分量最重的角色。嘿，如果你真想感受一下她的人气——以及她那注了水的履历——看看她在2003年卡普空游戏《黑杰克》中的像素形象就知道了。

paragraphs.en: And while it's difficult to deny the smile-inducing novelty of racing down icy slopes as Claire, decked out in her signature red vest and shorts, in original PlayStation extreme sports entry Trick'N Snowboarder, it's always felt like she deserved so much more.
paragraphs.cn: 不可否认，控制克莱尔穿着标志性的红背心和短裤，在初代PlayStation极限运动游戏《Trick'N Snowboarder》的冰坡上飞驰，确实有种令人莞尔的新鲜感，但总让人觉得她理应得到更多。

paragraphs.en: Resident Evil Veronica promises that more.
paragraphs.cn: 《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》承诺将带来更多。

paragraphs.en: Whether you've been a fierce supporter of the Redfield sibling since her 1992 debut or became a fan as soon as she removed her motorcycle helmet to use Mizoil Gas Station's payphone in the 2019 remake, you could argue bringing her back in an updated take on a 26-year-old game still isn't enough. But with its three remakes released so far, Capcom proved it wasn't just rewrapping its adored classics in prettier polygons, but rebuilding and reimagining the entire experiences from the ground up, essentially putting them on par, in every regard, with the brand's more recent releases.
paragraphs.cn: 不管你从1992年她首次登场就是这位雷德菲尔德家女儿的铁杆支持者，还是在2019年重制版中看到她摘下摩托车头盔、用Mizoil Gas Station的付费电话时就喜欢上她，你或许可以说，让她在一款26年前游戏的重制版中回归仍然不够。但凭借目前发布的三款重制版，卡普空证明了自己不只是用更精美的多边形重新包装那些备受珍爱的经典，而是彻底重建并重新构想了整个体验，使其在各个方面都与该系列更近期的作品并驾齐驱。

paragraphs.en: But like an attache case equipped with an expansion upgrade, RE4 made additional room for improvements, among them new narrative elements, fresh foes, and several layers of polish that ultimately allowed Leon's misadventures in Spain to fit more seamlessly into the series' always-evolving story and universe.
paragraphs.cn: 但就像装备了扩容升级的公文箱一样，《生化危机4》为改进留出了额外空间，其中包括新叙事元素、新敌人和多层打磨，最终让里昂在西班牙的离奇遭遇更无缝地融入系列不断演进的故事和宇宙中。

paragraphs.en: With all the confidence of a megalomaniacal Umbrella scientist, I fully expect Veronica to do the same, starting with adding more layers to a character that had already received a significant overhaul. While Claire's original RE2 and Code: Veronica turns proved her to be a heroic badass with a soft side, those traits were significantly evolved for her 2019 return to Raccoon City.
paragraphs.cn: 带着安布雷拉狂妄科学家般的十足信心，我完全期待《维罗妮卡》重制版也能做到同样的事，首先是为这个已经经历过重大改造的角色增添更多层次。虽然克莱尔在原版《生化危机2》和《代号：维罗妮卡》中的表现证明她是一位有温柔面的强悍英雄，但这些特质在她2019年重返浣熊市时得到了显著进化。

paragraphs.en: With plenty of heavy lifting handled by veteran RE voice actor Stephanie Panisello – who has not yet been confirmed for the Veronica remake – Claire's RE2 comeback packed genuine humor, emotional depth, and multiple nuanced layers that made her even more likeable. From her heartfelt moments bonding with young Sherry Birkin to dropping expletive-laced one-liners mid-battle, she not only cemented her status as a franchise-favorite, but elevated it to new endearing heights.
paragraphs.cn: 在《生化危机》系列资深配音演员Stephanie Panisello（目前尚未确认是否参与《维罗妮卡》重制版）的扛鼎演绎下，克莱尔在《生化危机2》重制版中的回归充满了真切的幽默、情感深度和多层次细节，使她更加讨人喜欢。从她与年幼的雪莉·柏金建立情感纽带的感人时刻，到战斗中脱口而出的粗口俏皮话，她不仅巩固了自己作为系列最受欢迎角色的地位，还将这份喜爱推向了新的高度。

paragraphs.en: Some seven years after her terrifying trek through that zombie-inhabited police station, I expect her Veronica characterization to further build on the appeal that'd already guaranteed I wouldn't want to brave a walking-corpse apocalypse with anyone else.
paragraphs.cn: 距离她在那座丧尸横行的警局里惊魂逃生约七年后，我期待她在《维罗妮卡》中的角色塑造能更进一步，那种魅力早已让我确信，我绝不想换其他任何人来陪我闯这片遍地行尸的末日世界。

paragraphs.en: Speaking of the remake's infected wasteland and Claire's struggle through it, Capcom has promised to take a page from RE2's and RE4's reimaginings , which were handled by the same team tackling Veronica. This ensures the game will remain faithful to what made the original an action-fueled favorite, while also significantly tinkering and tweaking it to improve the source material's mechanics and systems, seamlessly bringing them up to speed with the franchise's modern chapters.
paragraphs.cn: 谈到重制版里那片被感染的荒芜之地以及克莱尔在其中的挣扎，卡普空承诺会借鉴《生化危机2》和《生化危机4》重制版的思路——这两部正是由负责《维罗妮卡》的同一支团队操刀。这既能让游戏忠实保留原版动作驱动的魅力精髓，也能对源素材的机制和系统进行大幅调整与改良，使它们无缝对齐系列现代作品的步调。

paragraphs.en: There's no word yet if we'll be blasting through the mutated masses with the Claire's RE2 mini-gun, but I'd bet my last green herb that the biggest changes will manifest in a gameplay makeover that mirrors the over-the-shoulder, third-person action of the recent remakes – ideally expanding the mechanical complexity like RE4's remake did. Veronica will also contain at least one first-person exploration-focused segment, as evidenced in its announce trailer, similar to the scene that reveals Jill in RE3's remake
paragraphs.cn: 目前还没有消息说我们能否用克莱尔在《生化危机2》里的迷你机枪轰杀成群变异体，但我敢押上最后一株绿草打赌，最大的改变会体现在玩法改造上：采用类似近几作重制版的越肩第三人称动作风格，最好能像《生化危机4》重制版那样拓展机制复杂性。《维罗妮卡》还会包含至少一段聚焦探索的第一人称环节，正如公布预告片所示，类似《生化危机3》重制版吉尔现身的那个场景。

paragraphs.en: These new scenes should also translate into fresh narrative elements that nicely build on the beloved source material , while also refining and expanding it to organically fit the overall timeline that's since been established. The series has already leaned into this more cohesive structure with its naming conventions, dropping chronological titles – save for some cleverly cryptic roman numerals – from recent chapters Resident Evil Biohazard, Village, and Requiem. Where the original "Code: Veronica" subtitle – and, moreso, the later-released PlayStation 2 version's "Code: Veronica X" – made the game feel more like a spinoff than a new sequential installment, the remake's straightforward "Veronica" remedies this.
paragraphs.cn: 这些新场景也应转化为新的叙事元素，在备受喜爱的原作基础上加以拓展，同时进行优化和扩充，使其有机融入此后建立的整体时间线。系列已通过命名惯例来构建更连贯的结构，在近期的《生化危机7》《生化危机 村庄》和《Requiem》中放弃了序号标题——仅保留某些巧妙隐晦的罗马数字。原版《代号：维罗妮卡》副标题——尤其是后来发行的PS2版《代号：维罗妮卡X》——让游戏更像是衍生作品而非新的正传续作，而重制版直接采用《维罗妮卡》则弥补了这一遗憾。

paragraphs.en: This next entry not only affords Capcom the opportunity to seamlessly integrate Claire's European misadventures into what's come before and after, but also address any lingering questions that were left unanswered in the original . So while Veronica will nicely pick up the story for newer fans brought up on the remakes and contemporary sequels, it also has the chance to satisfy seasoned survival horror fans who've been scratching their heads about a few things since rolling credits on the original over a quarter-century ago.
paragraphs.cn: 这部新作不仅让卡普空有机会将克莱尔的欧洲历险无缝融入系列前后的故事线，还能回应原版中那些悬而未决的疑问。因此，虽然《维罗妮卡》能为伴随重制版和现代续作成长起来的新粉丝们顺理成章地延续剧情，它同样也有望满足那些自四分之一个多世纪前通关原版后，一直对某些情节百思不得其解的老派生存恐怖粉丝。

paragraphs.en: Of course, the icing on this green + red + blue herb cake is the massive visual bump Veronica will receive via Capcom's proprietary RE Engine. Rebuilt from the ground-up with the same tech that's made the recent remakes and new releases shine as bright as a gemstone-encrusted treasure, Claire's harrowing search for Chris won't just look leaps and bounds better than the original, but will be on par with the series' recent output.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，这枚绿草+红草+蓝草蛋糕上的糖霜，就是《维罗妮卡》通过卡普空自研的RE引擎获得的巨大视觉跃升。游戏从头开始用与近几部重制版和新作相同的技术重建，正是这项技术让它们像镶满宝石的宝物一样熠熠生辉，因此克莱尔寻找克里斯的艰险之旅不仅在画面上远超原版，而且会与系列近期出品的作品看齐。

paragraphs.en: The clue-packed, immersive reveal trailer has already teased the gargantuan graphical upgrade, spending most its time showcasing that eye-popping Paris apartment where Chris has apparently been hiding out. But it's this game's unique settings, the Rockfort Island prison and Umbrella's Antarctic base, that I can't wait to see brought to detail-drenched life (and death) in the final game.
paragraphs.cn: 这支遍布线索、氛围感拉满的实机预告，已经把画面上的巨大飞跃剧透了大半——大部分镜头都对准了克里斯藏身的那间惊艳的巴黎公寓。但我最迫不及待想看到的，是洛克福特岛监狱和安布雷拉南极基地这些独具特色的场景，在最终成品里被刻画得细节爆表、步步惊心。

paragraphs.en: So whether you’re a relatively new RE recruit, wondering what the hell happens with Claire and Chris following the fallout of the RE2 remake, or you're a longtime T-Virus survivor who just can’t wait to get back behind the Umbrella-dismantling skills of one of the franchise's absolute best-but-underused protagonists, there's lots to look forward to when Veronica begins spreading its infection next year.
paragraphs.cn: 所以，不论你是刚入坑的《生化》新兵，想搞清楚《生化危机2重制版》事件之后克莱尔和克里斯到底经历了什么，还是早已身经百战的T病毒幸存者，等不及想再次操控这位系列最出色却又最被低估的主角，亲手瓦解安布雷拉的阴谋——《维罗妮卡》明年扩散蔓延之际，可期待的东西实在太多了。

translated_terms.Resident Evil Veronica: 生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版
